calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

JAMES SARRAIL, Esq. appeared for plaintiff ANITA GIANNINI, who was not present at today's hearing.
Defendant ELINOR HILL-COURTNEY present.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff ANITA GIANNINI, and against the Defendant ELINOR HILL-COURTNEY as follows:

1). ALL FACTS AND ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT ARE TRUE AND CORRECT
2). PLTF WAIVES RENT, FAIR MARKET VALUE AND ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS
3). DEFT WILL VACATE THE PREMISES NO LATER THAN MARCH 30, 2011

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-07-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: N. Bautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Anita Giannini, is present. Represented by Ronald Giannini
Attorney, James Sarrail, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Elanor Hill-Courtney, is present.
Attorney, Paul Behrend , representing the defendant through full scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David Brillant, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of MAR-07-2011 remains on calendar.

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Text Ruling
